meta.title: reTLDR - get a TL;DR for any web page
meta.description:
reTLDR.com allows you to paste a link, and get back a TL;DR . It uses firecrawler to read web pages, and falls back to a headless browser so it returns a meaningful TL;DR in almost every case.

You can also just pre-pend retldr.com/ to any web URL!

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] SLrH28ubOws: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template. Confirm you are on the latest version using  yt-dlp -U
